mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_asset (owner_user_id, kind, ref_type, ref_id, original_name, content_type, size_bytes, storage_key) VALUES (#{ownerUserId}, #{kind}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{originalName}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{storageKey})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM file_asset WHERE kind = 'ATTACHMENT' AND ref_type = 'COLLAB_MESSAGE' AND ref_id IS NULL AND created_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY created_at, id LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM file_asset WHERE kind IN ('AUDIO', 'VIDEO') AND ref_type = 'INTERVIEW_ANSWER' AND ref_id IS NULL AND created_at < #{cutoff} ORDER BY created_at, id LIMIT #{limit}
